summary: Frontend-only testing of AJPL Calculator UI changes. Tested: 1) Customer reference display in bill cards, 2) 30s auto-refresh (code verified), 3) URL tab persistence across AdminDashboard/Reports, 4) Back button preserving tabs, 5) Feedbacks 'Only with comments' checkbox, 6) Feedback comment Georgia serif font styling. All features working correctly.

issues: Console warnings: React key prop missing in TableBody (References tab)
Recharts dimension warnings on page load

passed_tests: AdminDashboard bill cards show 'Ref: {customer_reference}' in Pending tab
AdminDashboard bill cards show 'Ref: {customer_reference}' in Approved tab
AdminDashboard bill cards show 'Ref: {customer_reference}' in Drafts tab
AdminDashboard bill cards show 'Ref: {customer_reference}' in All tab
AdminDashboard URL updates to ?tab=approved when clicking Approved tab
AdminDashboard URL updates to ?tab=draft when clicking Drafts tab
AdminDashboard URL updates to ?tab=all when clicking All tab
Back button from bill page preserves ?tab=approved in URL
Reports page URL updates to ?tab=reference when clicking References tab
Reports page URL updates to ?tab=feedbacks when clicking Feedbacks tab
Back button from bill (via References tab) preserves ?tab=reference in URL
Feedbacks tab has 'Only with comments' checkbox (data-testid='show-only-comments-checkbox')
Checkbox toggles correctly and filters feedbacks
Feedback comments styled with Georgia serif font (inline style verified)
Feedback comments have bg-primary/5 background and border-l-2 border-primary/30 styling
critical_code_review_comments: Reports.js line ~637: React key prop warning - TableRow components need unique keys
ManagerDashboard URL persistence may need testing with actual manager role user (admin redirects to /admin)

admin.method: Click 'Admin Login' link, fill credentials, click 'Sign In as Admin'

seed_data_creation: Used existing test data from previous iterations
context_for_next_testing_agent: Tab URL persistence tested across AdminDashboard and Reports pages. Back button navigation correctly preserves tab state. Feedbacks filter checkbox exists with data-testid='show-only-comments-checkbox'. Comment styling uses inline Georgia serif font. Auto-refresh is 30s interval on AdminDashboard. Manager dashboard (/manager) redirects to /admin for admin users - may need manager role to fully test ManagerDashboard URL persistence.

auto_refresh_30s.note: Code verified - visual test would require 30+ second wait

tested_flows: Admin Approved tab -> Bill -> Back = ?tab=approved preserved
Reports References tab -> Bill -> Back = ?tab=reference preserved
back_button_preserves_tab.implementation: BillPage uses navigate(-1) which works with URL param tabs

mocked_apis.OTP_delivery: OTP codes shown in backend logs instead of actual SMS delivery
